summary: Tested Email OTP authentication flow (full end-to-end) and Header Quick Add dropdown navigation. All 8 features requested are working correctly.
seed_data_creation: OTP flow auto-creates users. New users created via OTP: otp.test.user@sentech.co.za, header.test@sentech.co.za
context_for_next_testing_agent: OTP authentication fully working in dev mode (SMTP not configured). OTP code is returned in dev_note field of response. Header Quick Add dropdown has 8 navigation items all working.

mocked_api.SMTP_email_sending: MOCKED - OTP code returned in API response as dev_note when SMTP_USERNAME is empty

Email_OTP_Tab_on_Login.tab_visible: PASS - Email OTP tab present with data-testid='tab-email-otp'
Email_OTP_Tab_on_Login.send_login_code_form: PASS - Email input and 'Send Login Code' button visible
Email_OTP_Tab_on_Login.otp_request_api: PASS - POST /api/auth/request-otp returns OTP in dev_note
Email_OTP_Tab_on_Login.otp_code_input_after_send: PASS - 6-digit code input appears after sending OTP
Email_OTP_Tab_on_Login.dev_mode_alert: PASS - Amber alert shows 'Dev Mode: OTP: XXXXXX'

Backend_OTP_Endpoints.POST_api_auth_request_otp_success: PASS - Returns 200 with message, email, dev_note (contains 6-digit OTP)
Backend_OTP_Endpoints.POST_api_auth_verify_otp_success: PASS - Returns 200 with access_token, token_type, user object
Backend_OTP_Endpoints.POST_api_auth_verify_otp_wrong_code: PASS - Returns 400 'Invalid OTP. X attempts remaining'
Backend_OTP_Endpoints.OTP_auto_creates_user: PASS - New user created if email not in DB

Header_Quick_Add_Dropdown.add_button_visible: PASS - Plus (+) button present with data-testid='header-add-btn'
Header_Quick_Add_Dropdown.dropdown_opens: PASS - Dropdown menu opens on click

Header_Search_Button.search_input_opens: PASS - Click opens search input field

previous_iterations_verified.iteration_2: White dialog backgrounds, toast notifications, Kanban drag-and-drop - all verified working
